Verifies that the save button text is displayed correctly.

Verifies that an error is shown when the address is cleared.
saveChanges_emptyCapacity_showsError() - Method in class com.example.getoutthere.organizer.OrganizerEditEventActivityTest
Verifies that an error is shown when the capacity is cleared.
saveChanges_emptyDescription_showsError() - Method in class com.example.getoutthere.organizer.OrganizerEditEventActivityTest
Verifies that an error is shown when the description is cleared.
saveChanges_emptyFee_showsError() - Method in class com.example.getoutthere.organizer.OrganizerEditEventActivityTest
Verifies that an error is shown when the fee is cleared.
saveChanges_emptyName_showsError() - Method in class com.example.getoutthere.organizer.OrganizerEditEventActivityTest
Verifies that an error is shown when the event name is cleared.
saveChanges_negativeFee_showsError() - Method in class com.example.getoutthere.organizer.OrganizerEditEventActivityTest
Verifies that an error is shown when the fee is negative.
saveChanges_nonNumericCapacity_showsError() - Method in class com.example.getoutthere.organizer.OrganizerEditEventActivityTest
Verifies that an error is shown when the capacity is not a valid whole number.
saveChanges_nonNumericFee_showsError() - Method in class com.example.getoutthere.organizer.OrganizerEditEventActivityTest
Verifies that an error is shown when the fee is not numeric.
saveChanges_nonNumericWaitlistLimit_showsError() - Method in class com.example.getoutthere.organizer.OrganizerEditEventActivityTest
Verifies that an error is shown when the waitlist limit is not a valid whole number.
saveChanges_zeroCapacity_showsError() - Method in class com.example.getoutthere.organizer.OrganizerEditEventActivityTest
Verifies that an error is shown when the capacity is zero.
saveChanges_zeroWaitlistLimit_showsError() - Method in class com.example.getoutthere.organizer.OrganizerEditEventActivityTest
Verifies that an error is shown when the waitlist limit is zero.
saveChangesButton_isEnabled() - Method in class com.example.getoutthere.organizer.OrganizerEditEventActivityTest
Verifies that the save changes button is enabled.
saveEvent() - Method in class com.example.getoutthere.organizer.OrganizerCreateEventActivity
Reads all event information entered by the organizer, validates the input, creates an Event object, and saves it to Firebase.
saveEventToFirestore(Event, EventRepository.RepositoryCallback<String>) - Method in class com.example.getoutthere.repositories.EventRepository
Saves the event object to Firestore using its event ID.
saveProfile() - Method in class com.example.getoutthere.entrant.ProfileActivity
Validates the input fields, creates a new EntrantProfile object, and saves it to the Firestore collection under the user's device ID.
saveQrCodePhotos(Bitmap, String) - Method in class com.example.getoutthere.organizer.EventQrCodeActivity
Saves the generated QR code image to the device photo gallery.

Sets the physical address or location of the event.

Sets the cancel click listener.

Sets the text content of the comment.

Sets the list of device IDs for the event's co-organizers.

Sets the current number of users on the waiting list.

Sets the displayed date text and updates the matching Timestamp field inside the activity.

Sets the description of the event.

Sets the unique device ID for this profile.

Sets the date the lottery draw occurs.
setEmail(String) - Method in class com.example.getoutthere.models.EntrantProfile
Sets the user's email address.

Sets the end date and time of the event.

Sets the unique identifier of the entrant who posted the comment.
setEntrantName(String) - Method in class com.example.getoutthere.models.Comment
Sets the display name of the entrant who posted the comment.

Sets the type/category of the event.

Sets the visibility of the event.

Sets the unique identifier for the event.

Sets the name of the event.

Writes CSV content to a temporary file and triggers the Android share sheet.
showCommentsDialog() - Method in class com.example.getoutthere.event.EventDetailsActivity
Creates and displays a dialog containing a real-time feed of event comments, along with an input field to submit new comments.
showDatePicker(boolean) - Method in class com.example.getoutthere.event.EventFilterFragment
Opens a DatePickerDialog and stores the selected date as milliseconds, displaying the formatted date string in the appropriate input field.
showDateTimePicker(EditText, OrganizerCreateEventActivity.TimestampSelectionListener) - Method in class com.example.getoutthere.organizer.OrganizerCreateEventActivity
Opens a date picker followed by a time picker, then stores the selected date and time as a Firebase Timestamp and displays it in the chosen input field.
showDateTimePicker(EditText, OrganizerEditEventActivity.TimestampSelectionListener) - Method in class com.example.getoutthere.organizer.OrganizerEditEventActivity
Opens a date picker followed by a time picker, then stores the selected date and time as a Firebase Timestamp and displays it in the chosen input field.
showInviteDialog(String, String) - Method in class com.example.getoutthere.organizer.WaitlistFragment
Shows a dialog allowing the organizer to search for an entrant by email to invite them.
showLotteryCriteriaDialog() - Method in class com.example.getoutthere.event.EventDetailsActivity
Displays an info about the lottery selection criteria
